args.query:
SELECT o.Id AS OpportunityId, o.CloseDate, o.StageName, oli.Product2Id
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON oli.OpportunityId = o.Id
WHERE REPLACE(o.ContactId,'#','') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'
  AND o.CloseDate >= DATE '2021-06-01' AND o.CloseDate < DATE '2021-07-01'
;

;

args.query:
SELECT o.Id AS OpportunityId, o.CloseDate, o.StageName, oli.Product2Id
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN OpportunityLineItem oli ON oli.OpportunityId = o.Id
WHERE REPLACE(o.ContactId,'#','') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'
  AND CAST(o.CloseDate AS DATE) >= DATE '2021-06-01'
  AND CAST(o.CloseDate AS DATE) < DATE '2021-07-01'
;

args.query: SELECT AccountId FROM Contact WHERE REPLACE(Id,'#','')='003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR' LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT p.Id, p.Name, p.Description
FROM Product2 p
WHERE LOWER(TRIM(p.Name)) LIKE '%ai processing unit%'
   OR LOWER(TRIM(p.Name)) LIKE '%ai%processing%unit%'
   OR LOWER(TRIM(p.Description)) LIKE '%ai%processing%unit%'
LIMIT 50;

   OR LOWER(TRIM(p.Description)) LIKE '%ai%processing%unit%'
LIMIT 50;

args.query:

FROM Product2 p
WHERE LOWER(p.Name) LIKE '%ai%'
  AND (LOWER(p.Name) LIKE '%unit%' OR LOWER(p.Description) LIKE '%unit%')
LIMIT 50;
